name: claude
description: Use Claude Code from Codex to review code or delegate tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate tasks and reviews to Claude Code
interface.longDescription: Hand work to Claude Code without leaving Codex. Delegates through the local `claude` CLI, so it reuses the auth, config, MCP servers, and CLAUDE.md you already have.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude to review my working tree
Delegate this failing test to Claude Code
Get a second opinion from Claude on this design
